title: Weather Console
caption: The proposed interface begins with environmental measurements rather than a prerecorded score.

title: Urban Weather Feed
caption: The score begins in real atmospheric data.

title: Translation Layer
caption: Explicit mapping rules convert selected measurements into tempo, register, density, articulation, or processing instructions.

title: Data-to-Score Map
caption: The map distinguishes incoming data, normalized ranges, musical parameters, and the performer’s interpretive freedom.

title: Violin Under Atmosphere
caption: The performer responds to a changing score; live installation documentation remains to be produced.

title: Latency / Missing Data
caption: Smoothing, fallback states, and bounded mappings keep delayed or incomplete telemetry from becoming arbitrary sound.

title: Heat After Tone
caption: The score ends, but the atmosphere remains.
